subject: Pan — a young girl with short dark hair wearing a red bandana, white tank top, and yellow shorts, posed confidently in an outdoor rocky canyon setting
description: A young girl stands in a confident, slightly forward-leaning pose against a bright outdoor backdrop of rocky canyon walls. She has short dark hair and wears a red headband or bandana, a white sleeveless top, and yellow shorts. Her expression is bright and resolute — she appears cheerful yet ready for a fight. The setting suggests a daytime outdoor environment with warm rocky terrain and open sky. The overall tone is lively and energetic, in contrast to the combat-heavy cards around her in the set.
foreground: Young girl in casual fighter outfit — red bandana, white tank, yellow shorts — posed confidently
